workflow-report.title: Workflow report
workflow-report.description: HTML report summarising transcript discovery, quantification, optional SQANTI3 classification, and optional differential analysis results.

read-stats-per-file.title: Per-file read stats
read-stats-per-file.description: Read statistics for each input FASTQ file in a sample, when FASTQ read stats are available.

read-stats-per-read.title: Per-read stats
read-stats-per-read.description: Read statistics for individual reads in a sample, when this output is enabled.

sample-fastq.title: Ingress reads
sample-fastq.description: Reads prepared from the input data for downstream analysis.

sample-metadata.title: Ingress metadata
sample-metadata.description: Per-sample metadata used by the workflow.

sample-bam.title: Aligned BAM
sample-bam.description: Genome-aligned BAM used for bambu, optional SQANTI3 QC, and IGV.

sample-flagstat.title: Alignment summary
sample-flagstat.description: samtools flagstat output for the aligned BAM.

annotation-reference-summary.title: Reference and annotation preparation summary
annotation-reference-summary.description: Summary of reference and annotation preparation, including seqname overlap, build/provider hints, and excluded unstranded annotation counts.

unstranded-annotation.title: Excluded unstranded annotation records
unstranded-annotation.description: Full set of annotation records excluded because their strand was not '+' or '-'. Present only when unstranded records are found.

cohort-gtf.title: Cohort transcriptome GTF
cohort-gtf.description: Joint bambu transcript model used as the primary cohort transcriptome.

cohort-fasta.title: Cohort transcriptome FASTA
cohort-fasta.description: Transcript sequences derived from the joint cohort GTF.

cohort-transcript-counts.title: Cohort transcript counts
cohort-transcript-counts.description: Transcript-level count matrix produced by bambu.

cohort-gene-counts.title: Cohort gene counts
cohort-gene-counts.description: Gene-level count matrix derived from bambu output.

cohort-transcript-metadata.title: Cohort transcript metadata
cohort-transcript-metadata.description: Transcript annotations and bambu transcript classes for the cohort model.

cohort-sqanti-summary.title: Cohort SQANTI3 summary
cohort-sqanti-summary.description: SQANTI3 classification summary for the cohort transcriptome when SQANTI3 QC is enabled.

sample-gtf.title: Per-sample transcriptome GTF
sample-gtf.description: Independent bambu transcript model for an individual sample.

sample-fasta.title: Per-sample transcriptome FASTA
sample-fasta.description: Transcript sequences derived from the per-sample GTF.

sample-transcript-counts.title: Per-sample transcript counts
sample-transcript-counts.description: Transcript-level abundance estimates for the per-sample bambu model.

sample-gene-counts.title: Per-sample gene counts
sample-gene-counts.description: Gene-level abundance estimates for the per-sample bambu model.

sample-transcript-metadata.title: Per-sample transcript metadata
sample-transcript-metadata.description: Transcript annotations and bambu transcript classes for the per-sample model.

sample-sqanti-summary.title: Per-sample SQANTI3 summary
sample-sqanti-summary.description: SQANTI3 classification summary for the per-sample transcriptome when SQANTI3 QC is enabled.

dge-results.title: Differential gene expression results
dge-results.description: DESeq2 gene-level differential expression results for one contrast.

dge-report.title: Differential gene expression plots
dge-report.description: PDF plots generated during DESeq2 analysis for one contrast.

dtu-transcript-results.title: Differential transcript usage results
dtu-transcript-results.description: Transcript-level DTU results for one contrast.

dtu-gene-results.title: Differential transcript usage gene summary
dtu-gene-results.description: Gene-level DTU summary for one contrast.

dexseq-results.title: DEXSeq results
dexseq-results.description: Full DEXSeq result table for one contrast.

dtu-report.title: Differential transcript usage plots
dtu-report.description: PDF plots generated during DEXSeq analysis for one contrast.

igv-config.title: IGV configuration
igv-config.description: JSON configuration for viewing the aligned BAMs in IGV.

reference-index.title: Reference FASTA index
reference-index.description: FAI index for the reference genome published for IGV.

reference-gzi-index.title: Reference GZI index
reference-gzi-index.description: GZI index for a compressed reference genome published for IGV.
